modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to register for classes due to missing time ticket.

full_description_text: The user is trying to register for graduate classes but encounters an error. The message states that there is no registration time ticket available. This issue prevents them from completing the registration process.
short_description: Unable to register for classes due to missing time ticket.
description: The user is trying to register for graduate classes but encounters an error. The message states that there is no registration time ticket available. This issue prevents them from completing the registration process.
